---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Request

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

**Example**: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 💡 Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## 📊 Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] All users
- [ ] Users with large projects
- [ ] Users with complex dependencies
- [ ] Users with specific metadata types
- [ ] DevOps engineers
- [ ] Salesforce developers
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📝 User Story Format

If applicable, describe this feature as a user story:

**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [feature]
**So that** [benefit]

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

What would make this feature "done"?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues, user stories, or documentation.

- Related to #___
- Depends on #___

## 🏷️ Additional Labels

Which epic does this relate to?

- [ ] Core Infrastructure
- [ ] Metadata Parsers
- [ ] Dependency Analysis
- [ ] Wave Generation
- [ ] CLI Commands
- [ ] Agentforce Integration
- [ ] Testing Infrastructure
- [ ] Error Handling
- [ ] Project Scanner
- [ ] Deployment Execution

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
